title: glyceria distans
intro: Glyceria distans, also known as mannagrass or zinnia grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America and Europe, characterized by its tall stems and distinctive flat spikes of flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Glyceria distans include treating digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Glyceria distans can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
